prestazioni: Engine swap to a Cummins ISX15 15L inline-6 diesel (engine code: ISX15-600ST) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by S&S Diesel Motorsport, paired with a Garrett GT5533R turbocharger (88mm inducer) and a custom 4.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by MBRP with 304-grade mandrel bends for reduced backpressure

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a ZF 16S2521 16-speed overdrive transmission with a PTO-compatible bellhousing, upgraded to a South Bend Clutch dual-disc ceramic setup (14-inch diameter) and a custom TATRA-specific transfer case with reinforced gears by Meritor for 6x6 torque distribution

Suspension overhaul with custom-made 3-way adjustable Öhlins TTX46 coilovers (remote reservoirs) for the TATRA Phoenix’s unique independent front and rear axles, paired with polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (part #SPF0116K) and a front sway bar upgrade to a 40mm hollow chromoly unit by Hellwig (part #7688)
estetica: Custom widebody conversion kit by Liberty Walk (LB Works) specifically adapted for the TATRA Phoenix’s cab-over-engine layout, featuring carbon fiber fender flares with integrated LED turn signals and a 3-inch extended wheelbase for aggressive stance

Full custom aero package by Rocket Bunny (Pandem) including a carbon fiber front splitter with integrated air curtains, a rear diffuser with dual 4-inch exhaust cutouts, and a roof-mounted air intake scoop for the Cummins ISX15 engine, all finished in matte military green with reflective pinstriping

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and Recaro Pole Position seats (part #208010) modified for TATRA’s unique seating position, paired with a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (UK) featuring integrated LED lighting and a Motec C127 dash display with live telemetry for boost, EGT, and transmission temps
